name: Prime Haul — MoveScan Social Proof Engine

nodes.name: 01 — MoveScan Survey Complete Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives POST from MoveScan when a homeowner completes a survey and gets matched with removal companies. Payload: survey_id, customer_first_name, origin_postcode, dest_postcode, move_date, bedrooms, quotes_sent, matched_companies[], cbm_volume

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Immediately returns 200 so MoveScan doesn't time out. Processing continues asynchronously.

nodes.name: 02 — Extract & Format Survey Data
nodes.notes: Maps raw webhook payload to clean named variables for downstream nodes. Normalises postcodes, formats dates, categorises volume.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 1200,
  "system": "You are a social media manager for Prime Haul (primhaul.co.uk), a removal leads marketplace powered by MoveScan technology. You write social proof content that shows real people getting instant removal quotes. Tone: helpful, modern, consumer-friendly. Never mention surnames or full addresses. Your goal is to make moving house feel easy and show how fast MoveScan works. Always include a CTA to try MoveScan.",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Generate social media posts celebrating a successful MoveScan survey completion.

Survey details:
- Moving from: {{ $json.originArea }} area
- Moving to: {{ $json.destArea }} area
- Home size: {{ $json.volumeCategory }} ({{ $json.bedrooms }} bedroom{{ $json.bedrooms > 1 ? 's' : '' }})
- Move date: {{ $json.moveDateFormatted }}
- Quotes sent to: {{ $json.quotesSent }} removal companies
- Matched with: {{ $json.matchedCompanies }}

Generate 4 platform-specific posts as JSON:

1. Facebook post: 80-120 words, social proof angle ("Another happy mover just got X quotes in 90 seconds!"), warm and relatable, include emoji, end with CTA to primhaul.co.uk
2. Instagram caption: 50-80 words, punchier, include 5-7 hashtags (#PrimeHaul #MoveScan #MovingHouse #RemovalQuotes #UKMoving + location-specific)
3. Pinterest pin description: 40-60 words, SEO-optimised, helpful moving tip angle that links back to getting quotes
4. TikTok caption: 20-40 words, Gen-Z/millennial friendly, casual tone, trending hashtag style, include #MovingHouseTips #MoveScan

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{"fb_post": "...", "ig_post": "...", "pinterest_desc": "...", "tiktok_caption": "...", "confidence": 0.0}"
    }
  ]
}

nodes.name: 03 — Claude: Generate Social Proof Content
nodes.notes: Calls Claude claude-sonnet-4-6 with structured prompt. Returns JSON with fb_post, ig_post, pinterest_desc, tiktok_caption, and confidence score. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in n8n credentials.

nodes.name: Parse Claude Response
nodes.notes: Extracts fb_post, ig_post, pinterest_desc, tiktok_caption, and confidence score from Claude's JSON response.

nodes.name: 04 — Confidence Score Gate (>= 0.75)
nodes.notes: Routes based on Claude's confidence. >= 0.75 = auto-publish. < 0.75 = Slack review required.

nodes.name: Slack: Human Review Required
nodes.notes: Sends post draft to Slack #social-review channel with approve/reject buttons. Requires Slack bot token in credentials.

nodes.name: 05 — Smart Scheduler (Optimal Time)
nodes.notes: Waits until optimal publishing time. Weekday evening 7pm for same-day leads. Monday 8am for weekend leads. Uses luxon DateTime with Europe/London timezone.

nodes.name: 06a — Publish to Facebook
nodes.notes: Posts to Prime Haul Facebook page via Graph API. Set FB_PAGE_ID_PRIMHAUL and FB_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN_PRIMHAUL as n8n environment variables.

nodes.name: 06b — Create IG Media Container
nodes.notes: Step 1 of 2-step Instagram publish. Creates media container. Requires a default branded image URL (PRIMHAUL_DEFAULT_IMAGE_URL env var). Set IG_ACCOUNT_ID_PRIMHAUL and IG_ACCESS_TOKEN_PRIMHAUL.

nodes.name: Wait 30s (IG Processing)
nodes.notes: Instagram requires a brief wait after container creation before publishing.

nodes.name: 06c — Publish IG Post
nodes.notes: Step 2: publishes the IG media container. Returns ig_media_id for logging.

nodes.name: 06d — Create Pinterest Pin
nodes.notes: Creates a pin on the Prime Haul 'Moving House Tips' board via Pinterest API v5. Set PINTEREST_BOARD_ID_PRIMHAUL_TIPS and PRIMHAUL_PINTEREST_IMAGE_URL env vars. Auth via Bearer token in httpHeaderAuth credential.

string.name: tiktok_status
string.value: PLACEHOLDER — TikTok API approval pending. Caption saved for manual posting.

nodes.name: 06e — TikTok Placeholder (API Pending)
nodes.notes: PLACEHOLDER NODE: TikTok Business API requires app approval (1-2 week process). Once approved, replace this with TikTok Content Posting API call (POST https://open.tiktokapis.com/v2/post/publish/content/init/). For now, the caption is saved to Airtable for manual TikTok posting.

nodes.name: Merge All Publish Results
nodes.notes: Waits for all 4 publishing branches (Facebook, Instagram, Pinterest, TikTok) to complete before passing a single combined item to the Airtable log node. Prevents duplicate Airtable rows.

nodes.name: 07 — Log Run to Prime Haul CRM
nodes.notes: Logs every workflow run to Airtable Prime Haul CRM. Set AIRTABLE_BASE_ID_PRIMHAUL env var. Create 'Social Automation Runs' table with matching field names.

main.node: 07 — Log Run to Prime Haul CRM

_readme.workflow_name: Prime Haul — MoveScan Social Proof Engine
_readme.trigger: Webhook — fires when a MoveScan survey is completed and quotes are sent to removal companies
required_credentials: Slack Bot Token (httpHeaderAuth) — optional, for review workflow
required_env_vars: FB_PAGE_ID_PRIMHAUL — Prime Haul Facebook Page ID
PINTEREST_BOARD_ID_PRIMHAUL_TIPS — Board ID for moving tips pins
PRIMHAUL_DEFAULT_IMAGE_URL — Public URL of default branded image for IG posts
PRIMHAUL_PINTEREST_IMAGE_URL — Public URL of Pinterest pin image (2:3 ratio recommended)
AIRTABLE_BASE_ID_PRIMHAUL — Airtable base ID for Prime Haul CRM
SLACK_CHANNEL_SOCIAL_REVIEW — Slack channel for low-confidence reviews
MOVESCAN_WEBHOOK_SECRET — Webhook auth token shared with MoveScan
setup_steps: 1. Import this JSON into n8n (Settings > Import Workflow)
2. Set all environment variables in n8n Settings > Environment Variables
3. Create credentials for Anthropic, Pinterest, Airtable
4. Create 'Social Automation Runs' table in your Airtable base (see airtable-schema-primhaul.json)
6. Add MOVESCAN_WEBHOOK_SECRET to webhook header auth
7. Upload branded images to public CDN/Supabase for IG and Pinterest defaults
8. Test with a manual webhook trigger using sample payload
10. Once TikTok API is approved, replace placeholder node with TikTok Content Posting API call
_readme.tiktok_note: TikTok Business API requires app approval (1-2 weeks). Once approved: replace node 06e with POST to https://open.tiktokapis.com/v2/post/publish/content/init/ with video upload flow. Caption is stored in Airtable for manual posting until then.
